tests.label: Labour share decline via task-displacing capital
tests.formula: d_labour_share ~ lag_d_techint + rti + lag_d_techint:rti + C(country_iso3) + C(year)
tests.description: Technology should reduce the labour share more strongly in routine-intensive sectors.

tests.label: Employment polarization and compression
tests.formula: d_emp_per_va ~ lag_d_techint + rti + lag_d_techint:rti + C(country_iso3) + C(year)
tests.description: Technology should reduce labour demand per unit of value added in routine-intensive sectors.

tests.label: Temporary rent and competitive erosion
tests.description: Technology should raise margins temporarily, while high margins should mean-revert.

tests.label: Rising organic composition of capital
tests.description: Technology should raise the organic composition of capital.
